cases.prompt: Turn this feature idea into an executable goal package with clear tasks and context.
cases.expected_behavior: Produces a structured setup goal package.

cases.prompt: Interview me about the idea and then organize the implementation steps.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses guided clarification to produce a usable plan package.
This is implementation, not setup or planning.

cases.prompt: I have a rough idea and a messy repo; help me turn it into a concrete goal with steps.
cases.expected_behavior: Brings structure to an under-defined idea and repo context.
